Provenance.description:
Tracks how artifact content was produced and its review state.

This is central to APLH's knowledge governance: every piece of content
must declare its origin and confidence level so that reviewers can
assess trustworthiness.

source_refs.description: List of source document references (document IDs, URLs, etc.)
source_refs.title: Source Refs

method.description: Description of the production method (e.g., 'extracted by Gemini 3.1 Pro from CCAR-33 §33.28')
method.title: Method

reviewed_by.description: Reviewer identity (empty if not yet reviewed)
reviewed_by.title: Reviewed By

review_date.description: ISO date of review (empty if not yet reviewed)
review_date.title: Review Date

Provenance.title: Provenance

ProvenanceSourceType.description: How the artifact content was produced.
ProvenanceSourceType.title: ProvenanceSourceType

description:
Structured engineering requirement for propulsion control logic.

Fields capture the requirement statement, its conditions, expected system
response, verification approach, and links to related artifacts.

title.description: Short descriptive title of the requirement
title.title: Title

description.description: Full requirement statement in engineering prose
description.title: Description

source_refs.description: Source documents this requirement derives from (e.g., regulation clause, spec section)
source_refs.title: Source Refs

triggers.description: Events or conditions that activate this requirement
triggers.title: Triggers

conditions.description: Preconditions that must be true for this requirement to apply
conditions.title: Conditions

expected_response.description: What the system should do when triggered under the stated conditions
expected_response.title: Expected Response

verification_observables.description: Observable outputs or states that can verify compliance
verification_observables.title: Verification Observables

safety_relevance.description: Whether this requirement has safety implications (triggers additional review)
safety_relevance.title: Safety Relevance

linked_functions.description: FUNC-xxxx IDs of functions that implement this requirement
linked_functions.title: Linked Functions

linked_interfaces.description: IFACE-xxxx IDs of interfaces related to this requirement
linked_interfaces.title: Linked Interfaces

linked_abnormals.description: ABN-xxxx IDs of abnormal conditions related to this requirement
linked_abnormals.title: Linked Abnormals

linked_modes.description: MODE-xxxx IDs of modes related to this requirement
linked_modes.title: Linked Modes

linked_transitions.description: TRANS-xxxx IDs of transitions related to this requirement
linked_transitions.title: Linked Transitions

linked_guards.description: GUARD-xxxx IDs of guard conditions related to this requirement
linked_guards.title: Linked Guards

title: Requirement
